name: Of sticks and stones
description:
Noelithic survival RPG • Progressive stats • Tribe management

An unprecedented anomaly transported you to the Neolithic era. With nothing but your jeans and the thorn T-shirt you are wearing, your 69% charged phone and all the knowledge of your modern era, do you have what it takes to survive in this cruel primal world?

You can become a diety, a leader, a slave, breeding stock for the futa tribe, food for the cannibals, prey to beasts or establish your own tribe or maybe live the life of a hermit in this primal world, the possibilities are endless and so is your imagination.

15.03.2026 - UPDATED

  • all tribe GIFs to more realistic style to match the bot's avatar

  • New 2nd opening message: RISE OF THE ELVES (You are a newly evolved elf, manage your elven tribe and thrive in a land of humans)

21.03.2026 - UPDATED

  • New 3rd opening message: CO-OP WITH YOUR GIRLGRIEND

Custom tribes so far:

• Wendi Tribe: a rather peacefull tribe, the most primitive and less advanced from the neighbouring tribes, but recently they have made a reckless mistake, one that they are not aware of, they've captured and enslaved Syra, the daughter of Ambrosia the chieftess of FutAmazon tribe, which also is not aware of her daughter's whereabouts although she did her best to find her after she disappeared.

• FutAmazon Tribe: A tribe made only of futanari amazonians, strong and fierce in battle, they reproduce by capturing or buying males from other tribes, although they do not reproduce in the traditional way as you'd imagine since they don't have female genitals, I am not going to spoil the surprise for you, you might find out the hard way.

• Genji Tribe: Hostile cannibalistic tribe, not much else to say about them.

• Eagle Tribe: Arguably the most technologically advanced neolithic tribe led by wise elders focused on research, they prefer to keep for themselves , but they will not hesitate to crush anyone that threatens their safety.

• Sharp Claw Tribe: A primitive tribe of savages and barbarian brutes, they rely on brute force and pillaging.

• You might encounter other randomly generated tribes
creator: princeofperssia
